title: Willing to Invest $1000 for a Profitable EA, Must Show Results, Profits Shared
author: Good-Highway9120
selftext:
It’s useless to have an EA if you don’t put it on a live account. If you have a profitable EA, I’m willing to open a live account with $1000 and let the EA work. We’ll split the profits based on what the robot makes

If you’re willing to collaborate, please message me or reply to this post. I want to see the results the EA has produced first.
